visuals.title: Photometric Image Formation Pipeline
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Photometric Image Formation Pipeline
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Photometric Image Formation</text>
  
  <!-- Light Source -->
  <circle cx="80" cy="100" r="25" fill="#FFD54F" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="80" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#E65100" opacity="0">
    Light Source
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Object Surface -->
  <rect x="180" y="70" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="240" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Object Surface
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Camera -->
  <path d="M340 60 L340 110 L380 85 Z" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="360" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Camera
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Light Rays -->
  <line x1="105" y1="100" x2="180" y2="100" stroke="#FFA000" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Reflected Light -->
  <line x1="240" y1="100" x2="340" y2="85" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Image Formation Equation -->
  <rect x="60" y="200" width="300" height="80" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Image Formation Equation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    I(x,y) = R(x,y,θ,φ) · L(θ,φ)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    I = Image Intensity, R = Reflectance Function
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    L = Incident Illumination, θ,φ = Angles
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
